summary: Completed testing of Legal Info integration (Dosare & BPI) on CompanyPage. All 4 legal API endpoints working correctly (100% pass rate - 16/16 tests). LegalInfo component renders correctly on CompanyPage showing 'Fără probleme juridice înregistrate' message when no legal data exists.

backend_legal_summary: Response contains dosare_count, bpi_count, in_insolventa, has_legal_issues
backend_dosare: Response contains cui, firma_found, total, dosare array
backend_bpi: Response contains cui, total, records array
backend_lichidatori: Response contains cui, total, lichidatori array
frontend_company_page: CompanyPage loads correctly with all sections
Company header displays name and CUI
Quick stats cards visible (revenue, profit, employees, CAEN)
Legal Info section renders with correct title 'Informații Juridice'
LegalInfo component shows 'Fără probleme juridice înregistrate' when no legal data

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal Info integration complete. LegalInfo component is imported in CompanyPage.js (line 11) and rendered in the legal-info-section (lines 362-370). The component fetches data from 4 endpoints: /api/legal/summary/{cui}, /api/legal/dosare/{cui}, /api/legal/bpi/{cui}, /api/legal/lichidatori/{cui}. All endpoints use get_local_db() connecting to mfirme_local MongoDB. Test company CUI 2113693 has no legal issues (dosare_count=0, bpi_count=0), so the component correctly shows 'Fără probleme juridice înregistrate' message.
